raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"To better understand your request for help with this section, please select the primary focus: (1) Conceptual reconstruction (reframing thesis or contribution), (2) Logical consistency (verifying argument chain), (3) Evidence-claim alignment (checking support from reported results), (4) Novelty assessment (estimating delta vs prior work), (5) Structural reorganization (section-level ordering), (6) Writing polish (sentence and paragraph level), or (7) Citation and scholarship (reference accuracy and coverage).","rationale":{"RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing because any assistance with the section must ensure transparent reporting of limitations in the ACS metric to maintain validity.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent invalidating the help by allowing exaggerated claims about ACS's reliability and generalizability.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is load-bearing to ensure the assistance stays within the described scope of the ACS metric and evaluations without deviation.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing to mitigate risks such as misuse of the metric in sensitive AI applications.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is load-bearing to uphold proper attribution and citation integrity in the research section."}}

parsed.clarification_question: To better understand your request for help with this section, please select the primary focus: (1) Conceptual reconstruction (reframing thesis or contribution), (2) Logical consistency (verifying argument chain), (3) Evidence-claim alignment (checking support from reported results), (4) Novelty assessment (estimating delta vs prior work), (5) Structural reorganization (section-level ordering), (6) Writing polish (sentence and paragraph level), or (7) Citation and scholarship (reference accuracy and coverage).

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing because any assistance with the section must ensure transparent reporting of limitations in the ACS metric to maintain validity.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent invalidating the help by allowing exaggerated claims about ACS's reliability and generalizability.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is load-bearing to ensure the assistance stays within the described scope of the ACS metric and evaluations without deviation.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing to mitigate risks such as misuse of the metric in sensitive AI applications.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is load-bearing to uphold proper attribution and citation integrity in the research section.
